verses.en: O Allah, do not discipline me by means of Your punishment
and do not subject me to Your planned strategy.

verses.ar: مِنْ أَيْنَ لِيَ ٱلْخَيْرُ يَا رَبِّ
verses.en: min ayna liya alkhayru ya rabbi
while it is not found elsewhere save with You?
wa min ayna liya alnnajatu
while it cannot be attained save through You?

verses.ar: لاَ ٱلَّذِي أَحْسَنَ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰ عَنْ عَوْنِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ
verses.en: Neither he who has done righteous deeds can dispense with Your aid and mercy
nor can he who did evildoings, dare to challenge you,
and did not arrive at Your pleasure find an exit out of Your power.
ya rabbi
Through You have I known You.
You showed me the way to You
and invited me to come towards You.

verses.ar: وَلَوْلا أَنْتَ لَمْ أَدْرِ مَا أَنْتَ
verses.en: Had it been not for You, I would have never known who You are.
All praise be to Allah alone Who gives answer to me whenever I pray Him
although I am slow whenever He invites me.
All praise be to Allah alone Who gives me whenever I ask Him
although I become close-fisted when He asks me.

verses.ar: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي أُنَادِيهِ كُلَّمَا شِئْتُ لِحَاجَتِي
verses.en: All praise be to Allah alone Whom I call whenever I need something

verses.ar: وَأَخْلُو بِهِ حَيْثُ شِئْتُ لِسِرِّي بِغَيْرِ شَفِيعٍ
verses.en: and Whom I secretly converse whenever I want without need for an intercessor;
He thus grants my need.

verses.ar: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ أَدْعُو غَيْرَهُ
verses.en: All praise be to Allah alone other than Whom I never pray,

verses.ar: وَلَوْ دَعَوْتُ غَيْرَهُ لَمْ يَسْتَجِبْ لِي دُعَائِي
verses.en: and even if I pray anyone else, he shall never be able to respond to my prayer.

verses.ar: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ أَرْجُو غَيْرَهُ
verses.en: All praise be to Allah alone for other than Whom I do not hope,
and even if I hope for anyone else, he shall certainly disappoint me.

verses.ar: وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِي وَكَلَنِي إِلَيْهِ فَأَكْرَمَنِي
verses.en: All praise be to Allah alone Who has accepted me to depend upon Him and, thus, bestowed favors upon me.
He has not left me to people who will thus definitely humiliate me.
All praise be to Allah alone Who has sought my friendship
while He can dispense with me.
All praise be to Allah alone Who showed Himself gentle and considerate towards me
as if I have not sinned.
Accordingly, my Lord is the only One Whom I should thank
and He is the worthiest of being thanked by me.

verses.ar: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَجِدُ سُبُلَ ٱلْمَطَالِبِ إِلَيْكَ مُشْرَعَةً
verses.en: O Allah, I find the courses to asking from You wide open,
the springs to hoping for You overflowing,
seeking the help of Your favors reachable for them who have hopefully looked forward to You,
and the doors of praying You vulnerable for them who cry to You.
I know for sure that You give favorable reply to the petitioners
and relentlessly succor the aggrieved;
and to long for Your beneficence
and to accept Your will and judgment
are well compensations for that which the close-fisted misers deny
and alternative to that which is possessed by the stingy.
He who travels towards You will easily reach his destination.
You do not conceal Yourself against Your creatures
unless their evildoings stand between them and You.
I am thus turning to You carrying my appeals
and directing towards You carrying my needs.
I have sought the help of You alone
and begging You through my prayer
although I do not deserve to be observed by You
or to be pardoned by You.
Rather, I have full confidence in Your generosity,
I have relied upon the truthfulness of Your promise,
I have sought shelter with my faith in Your Oneness
and my certitude in the fact -which you know-
that I have no Lord other than You
and there is no god save You
wahdaka la sharika laka
O Allah, It is You Who have said, and Your sayings are always true
and Your promise is always valid:
“Ask Allah of His bounty.

verses.ar: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ بکم رحیماً“
verses.en: Verily Allah is ever Merciful to you.”
It is not Your habit, O my Chief,
that You instruct us to implore You and then You stop giving us,

verses.ar: وَأَنْتَ ٱلْمَنَّانُ بِٱلْعَطِيَّاتِ عَلَىٰ أَهْلِ مَمْلَكَتِكَ
verses.en: while You are the All-benefactor Who confers upon the people of Your Kingdom with (innumerable) donations
and You are the All-generous Who meets them with the kindness of Your compassion.

verses.ar: إِلٰهِي رَبَّيْتَنِي فِي نِعَمِكَ وَإِحْسَانِكَ صَغِيراً
verses.en: O my God, You brought me up amid Your bounties and favors when I was little
and You have mentioned me when I have grown up.

verses.ar: فَيَا مَنْ رَبَّانِي فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا بِإِحْسَانِهِ
verses.en: So, O He Who brought me up in this world with His bounties,
favors, and graces,

verses.ar: وَأَشَارَ لِي فِي ٱلآخِرَةِ إِلَىٰ عَفْوِهِ وَكَرَمِهِ
verses.en: and, in the Hereafter, will have referred to me with His amnesty and generosity!
My acquaintance with You, O my Lord, is the path taking me to You
and my love for You is the intermediary between You and me.
I am sure of the path to which You have lead me
and I rely upon my intermediary’s success before You.

verses.ar: أَدْعُوكَ يَا سَيِّدِي بِلِسَانٍ قَدْ أَخْرَسَهُ ذَنْبُهُ
verses.en: I pray You, O my Chief, with a tongue muted by its sins.

verses.ar: رَبِّ أُنَاجِيكَ بِقَلْبٍ قَدْ أَوْبَقَهُ جُرْمُهُ
verses.en: O Lord! I confidentially speak to You with a heart degraded by its offenses.
I pray You, O Lord, with terror, desire,
hope, and fear.
Whenever I think of my sins, O my Master, I panic,
but when I think of Your generosity, I feel desirous (for Your pardon).
Therefore, if You forgive me, You are already the best of those who show mercy,
and If You punish me, You are then not wronging me.

verses.ar: حُجَّتِي يَا اللَّهُ فِي جُرْأَتِي عَلَىٰ مَسْأَلَتِكَ
verses.en: Yet, it is Your munificence and Your generosity, O Allah, that gave me the courage to pray You,

verses.ar: مَعَ إِتْيَانِي مَا تَكْرَهُ جُودُكَ وَكَرَمُكَ
verses.en: despite that I have committed things that You dislike.

verses.ar: وَعُدَّتِي فِي شِدَّتِي مَعَ قِلَّةِ حَيَائِي رَأْفَتُكَ وَرَحْمَتُكَ
verses.en: It is Your kindness and mercy that I use as my means during misfortunes inflicting me despite my shamelessness.

verses.ar: وَقَدْ رَجَوْتُ أَنْ لاَ تَخِيبَ بَيْنَ ذَيْنِ وَذَيْنِ مُنْيَتِي
verses.en: I thus hope that my expectation will not be disappointed amid these two matters.
So, make my hopes become real
and answer my prayers.
O Greatest Besought One that has been ever besought,
and the Most Favorable Hoped One!

verses.ar: عَظُمَ يَا سَيِّدِي أَمَلِي وَسَاءَ عَمَلِي
verses.en: My expectation, O my Chief, has been great but my deed has been bad.
So, grant me Your pardon as much as my expectation,
and do not punish me for the worst of my deed.

verses.ar: فَإِنَّ كَرَمَكَ يَجِلُّ عَنْ مُجَازَاةِ ٱلْمُذْنِبِينَ
verses.en: Verily, Your generosity is too great to be compared to the penalty of the guilty,
and Your tolerance is too immense to be compared to the punishment of the negligent.
I, O my Chief, am seeking refuge with Your benevolence,
fleeing from You towards You,

verses.ar: مُتَنَجِّزٌ مَا وَعَدْتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّفْحِ عَمَّنْ أَحْسَنَ بِكَ ظَنّاً
verses.en: hoping for the amnesty that You have promised to confer upon one who keeps good idea about You.

verses.ar: وَمَا أَنَا يَا رَبِّ وَمَا خَطَرِي
verses.en: What am I? O Lord! What importance do I have?
Do me a favor out of Your benevolence
and be charitable to me by means of pardoning me.
O my Lord! Cover me with Your protective covering
and overlook reproaching me out of the generosity of Your Face.

verses.ar: فَلَوِ ٱطَّلَعَ ٱلْيَوْمَ عَلَىٰ ذَنْبِي غَيْرُكَ مَا فَعَلْتُهُ
verses.en: In fact, if anyone other than You has watched me while committing these sins, I may not commit them.
Had I anticipated immediateness of punishment, I might have avoided doing them.
Yet, this does not mean that You are the least important of those who watch over me
or You are the least weighty of those who observe me.

verses.ar: بَلْ لأَنَّكَ يَا رَبِّ خَيْرُ ٱلسَّاتِرِينَ
verses.en: Rather, this is because You, O my Lord, are the best of those who cover up (one’s defects),
the wisest of those who judge,
the most generous of those who act generously,
the concealer of defects,
the Forgiver of sins,
and the Knower of the unseen.
You conceal the defects out of Your liberality
and put off punishment because of Your forbearance.

verses.ar: فَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ حِلْمِكَ بَعْدَ عِلْمِكَ
verses.en: Hence, all praise be to You, for You act tolerably although You have full knowledge
and for Your pardon even though You have the absolute authority.

verses.ar: وَيَحْمِلُنِي وَيُجَرِّئُنِي عَلَىٰ مَعْصِيَتِكَ حِلْمُكَ عَنِّي
verses.en: It is Your forbearance with me that gives me latitude and makes me dare to break Your laws.

verses.ar: وَيَدْعُونِي إِلَىٰ قِلَّةِ ٱلْحَيَاءِ سِتْرُكَ عَلَيَّ
verses.en: It is Your concealing my faults that makes me act shamelessly before You.

verses.ar: وَيُسْرِعُنِي إِلَىٰ ٱلتَوَثُّبِ عَلَىٰ مَحَارِمِكَ مَعْرِفَتِي بِسَعَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ وَعَظِيمِ عَفْوِكَ
verses.en: It is my acquaintance with the broadness of Your mercy and the magnitude of Your pardon that make me hurry to violate that which You have deemed forbidden.
ya halimu ya karimu
ya hayyu ya qayyumu
O Forgiver of sins!
O Accepter of repentance!
O Owner of matchless bounties!
O He who has been doing favors since eternity!
Where is Your magnificent concealment (of one’s faults)?
Where is Your irreversible pardon?
Where is Your abrupt relief?
Where is Your immediate aid?
Where is Your boundless mercy?
Where is Your overflowing gifts?
Where are Your pleasant endowments?
Where are Your beautiful benefits?
Where is Your outstanding grace?
Where are Your giant bounties?
Where are Your eternal favors?
Where is Your generous liberality? O Generous Giver!
In Your name and in the name of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad, save me!
In the name of Your mercy, deliver me!
O All-benevolent!
O All-beneficent!
O All-gracious! O All-compassionate!

verses.ar: لَسْتُ أَتَّكِلُ فِي ٱلنَّجَاةِ مِنْ عِقَابِكَ عَلَىٰ أَعْمَالِنَا
verses.en: In my salvation from Your punishment, I do not rely upon my deeds;
rather, I depend on Your liberal generosity to us,
because You are verily the Lord of righteousness and the Lord of forgiveness.
You take the initiative in doing good out of Your graciousness
and overlook the sins out of Your generosity.
We thus do not know which of Your graces we should thank:

verses.ar: أَجَمِيلَ مَا تَنْشُرُ أَمْ قَبِيحَ مَا تَسْتُرُ
verses.en: should it be the handsome elegance that you spread over us, or our offensive deeds that you conceal?
Or should it be the fabulous favor that You grant and present,

verses.ar: أَمْ كَثِيرَ مَا مِنْهُ نَجَّيْتَ وَعَافَيْتَ
verses.en: or the numerous misfortunes from which You have saved and relieved?
O Beloved of those who endear themselves to Him!

verses.ar: وَيَا قُرَّةَ عَيْنِ مَنْ لاَذَ بِكَ وَٱنْقَطَعَ إِلَيْكَ
verses.en: O delight of the eyes of those who resort to Him and communicate Him incessantly!
You are the All-benevolent and we are the malevolent.

verses.ar: فَتَجَاوَزْ يَا رَبِّ عَنْ قَبِيحِ مَا عِنْدَنَا بِجَمِيلِ مَا عِنْدَكَ
verses.en: So, overlook, O Lord, the offensive that we hold by means of the good that You hold.

verses.ar: وَأَيُّ جَهْلٍ يَا رَبِّ لاَ يَسَعُهُ جُودُكَ
verses.en: There is not definitely any foolishness that can be uncovered by Your liberality.

verses.ar: أَوْ أَيُّ زَمَانٍ أَطْوَلُ مِنْ أَنَاتِكَ
verses.en: There is no period that may be longer than Your tolerance.

verses.ar: وَمَا قَدْرُ أَعْمَالِنَا فِي جَنْبِ نِعَمِكَ
verses.en: What value remains for our deeds if compared to Your favors?

verses.ar: وَكَيْفَ نَسْتَكْثِرُ أَعْمَالاً نُقَابِلُ بِهَا كَرَمَكَ
verses.en: How can we ever deem much any deeds if compared to Your generosity?

verses.ar: بَلْ كَيْفَ يَضِيقُ عَلَىٰ ٱلْمُذْنِبِينَ مَا وَسِعَهُمْ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ
verses.en: Moreover, how may Your broad mercy be narrow for the guilty?
ya wasi`a almaghfirati
O He Who extends both hands with mercy!
By Your Majesty I swear, O my Lord,

verses.ar: لَوْ نَهَرْتَنِي مَا بَرِحْتُ مِنْ بَابِكَ
verses.en: even if you chide me, I shall never leave Your Door
and I shall never stop flattering You!

verses.ar: لِمَا ٱنْتَهَىٰ إِلَيَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَعْرِفَةِ بِجُودِكَ وَكَرَمِكَ
verses.en: This is because I have full acquaintance with Your (indescribable) generosity and bounty.
Verily, You do whatever You will.

verses.ar: تُعَذِّبُ مَنْ تَشَاءُ بِمَا تَشَاءُ كَيْفَ تَشَاءُ
verses.en: You punish whomsoever You want however You want by whatever means You want.

verses.ar: وَتَرْحَمُ مَنْ تَشَاءُ بِمَا تشَاءُ كَيْفَ تَشَاءُ
verses.en: You have mercy upon whomsoever You want however You want by whatever means You want.
None is supposed to interrogate You for whatever You do,
non can ever contend with You about Your authority,
none can ever have a share in that which You hold,
none can ever object to Your decisions,

verses.ar: وَلاَ يَعْتَرِضُ عَلَيْكَ أَحَدٌ فِي تَدْبِيرِكَ
verses.en: and none can ever protest against that which You administer.
To You alone are creation and determination.
Blessed be Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

verses.ar: يَا رَبِّ هٰذَا مَقَامُ مَنْ لاَذَ بِكَ
verses.en: O my Lord, this is the manner of one who seeks Your shelter,
resorts to Your liberality,
and has been accustomed to be included with Your benevolence and graciousness.

verses.ar: وَأَنْتَ ٱلْجَوَادُ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَضِيقُ عَفْوُكَ
verses.en: You are certainly the All-munificent Whose amnesty never shrinks,
wa la yanqusu fadluka
and Whose mercy never diminishes.
We have full confidence in You on account of Your eternal habit of pardons,
boundless kindness, and limitless mercy.

verses.ar: أَفَتُرَاكَ يَا رَبِّ تُخْلِفُ ظُنُونَنَا أَوْ تُخَيِّبُ آمَالَنَا
verses.en: Is it ever expectable, O Lord, that You may disappoint us or may act on the contrary of our expectations?

verses.ar: كَلاَّ يَا كَرِيمُ فَلَيْسَ هٰذَا ظَنُّنَا بِكَ
verses.en: No, never. O Compassionate! This is neither our idea about You
nor our desire from You!

verses.ar: يَا رَبِّ إِنَّ لَنَا فِيكَ أَمَلاً طَوِيلاً كَثِيراً
verses.en: O my Lord, verily we have hope, big and large, in You.
Verily, we have great expectation in You.

verses.ar: عَصَيْنَاكَ وَنَحْنُ نَرْجُو أَنْ تَسْتُرَ عَلَيْنَا
verses.en: Albeit that we have disobeyed You, we still hope that You will cover our faults.

verses.ar: وَدَعَوْنَاكَ وَنَحْنُ نَرْجُو أَنْ تَسْتَجِيبَ لَنَا
verses.en: We have prayed You hoping that You will respond to us.
So, give success to our hopes, O our Lord!
We now know for sure what we deserve in exchange of our deeds.

verses.ar: وَلكِنْ عِلْمُكَ فِينَا وَعِلْمُنَا بِأَنَّكَ لاَ تَصْرِفُنَا عَنْكَ
verses.en: Yet, Your knowledge about us and our knowledge that You shall never let us down
have urged us to desire for You
even if we do not deserve Your mercy.

verses.ar: فَأَنْتَ أَهْلٌ أَنْ تَجُودَ عَلَيْنَا وَعَلَىٰ ٱلْمُذْنِبِينَ بِفَضْلِ سَعَتِكَ
verses.en: However, You are the worthiest of conferring upon us and upon the guilty with the grace of Your broad benevolence.
So, confer upon us with that of which You are worthy

verses.ar: وَجُدْ عَلَيْنَا فَإِنَّا مُحْتَاجُونَ إِلَىٰ نَيْلِكَ
verses.en: and act generously towards us, for we are in need for Your conferral.
O Oft-Forgiving, in Your light have we found the right path,
due to Your favor have we dispensed with the others,
and Your grace have we experienced in morns and eves.
Our sins are before You;
we beseech You, O Allah, to forgive them and we repent before You.
Whilst You show affection to us through Your graces, we take ourselves away from You through our sins.
You good descend upon us
while our evildoing ascends to You.

verses.ar: وَلَمْ يَزَلْ وَلاَ يَزَالُ مَلَكٌ كَرِيمٌ يَأْتِيكَ عَنَّا بِعَمَلٍ قَبِيحٍ
verses.en: Albeit that a noble angel always carries to You our offensive deeds,

verses.ar: فَلاَ يَمْنَعُكَ ذٰلِكَ مِنْ أَنْ تَحُوطَنَا بِنِعَمِكَ
verses.en: this has never made you stop encompassing us with Your graces
and conferring upon us your elegances.
Glory be to You! How Forbearing, Magnificent,
and Generous You are at all times!
Sacred be Your Names.
Grand be Your praise.
Munificent be Your deeds and acts.

verses.ar: أَنْتَ إِلٰهِي أَوْسَعُ فَضْلاً وَأَعْظَمُ حِلْماً
verses.en: You, O my God, are too expansive in graciousness and too great in forbearance
to punish me for my evildoings and sins.
(Here I am asking for) Amnesty! Amnesty! Amnesty!
O my Lord! O my Lord! O my Lord!
O Allah, cause us to be engaged with mentioning You,
save us from Your wrath,
deliver us from Your torture,
grant us Your donations,
confer upon us with Your grace,
and provide us the opportunity to go on pilgrimage to Your House
and to visit the tomb of Your Prophet,
may Your blessings, mercy,

verses.ar: وَمَغْفِرَتُكَ وَرِضْوَانُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
verses.en: forgiveness, and pleasure be upon him and his Household.
Verily, You are nigh and ready to answer.
Bless us with acting upon the obedience to You,
and receive us following the rule of You and Your Prophet,
blessings of Allah be on him and on his Household.
O Allah, forgive me and my parents,
and have mercy on them as they cared for me when I was little.
Reward them generously for their good deeds
and forgive their sins.
O Allah, forgive the faithful men and women,
be they alive or dead,
and join us together in bliss and happiness.
O Allah, forgive our living and dead persons,
our present and absent ones,
our male and female ones,
our infants and adults,
and our free ones and slaves.
Liars are those who ascribe rivals to Allah;
they have wandered far astray
and they will have suffered a manifest loss.

verses.ar: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
verses.en: O Allah, send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
seal my life with decency,

verses.ar: وَٱكْفِنِي مَا أَهَمَّنِي مِنْ أَمْرِ دُنْيَايَ وَآخِرَتِي
verses.en: help me overcome all that which aggrieves me in this world as well as the Hereafter,

verses.ar: وَلاَ تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيَّ مَنْ لاَ يَرْحَمُنِي
verses.en: do not let him who does not have mercy upon me prevail on me,
always keep on me an everlasting, protective covering,

verses.ar: وَلاَ تَسْلُبْنِي صَالِحَ مَا أَنْعَمْتَ بِهِ عَلَيَّ
verses.en: do not divest me of the well-mannered graces that You have conferred upon me,

verses.ar: وَٱرْزُقْنِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ رِزْقاً وَاسِعاً حَلاَلاً طَيِّباً
verses.en: and provide me, out of Your grace, with lawfully gotten, delightful sustenance.
O Allah, keep me under Your alert surveillance,
protect me with Your support,
take care of me with Your comprehensive care,
grant me opportunity to go on pilgrimage to Your Holy House

verses.ar: فِي عَامِنَا هٰذَا وَفِي كُلِّ عَامٍ
verses.en: in this year as well as all coming years,

verses.ar: وَزِيَارَةَ قَبْرِ نَبِيِّكَ وَٱلأَئِمَّةِ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّلامُ
verses.en: grant me to go on pilgrimage to the tombs of Your Prophet and the Imams, peace be upon them,

verses.ar: وَلاَ تُخْلِنِي يَا رَبِّ مِنْ تِلْكَ ٱلْمَشَاهِدِ ٱلشَّرِيفَةِ
verses.en: and do not deprive me, O Lord, of such honorable scenes
and noble situations.

verses.ar: اَللَّهُمَّ تُبْ عَلَيَّ حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَعْصِيَكَ
verses.en: O Allah, accept my repentance so that I will not disobey you ever again,
inspire me with goodness, good-doing,
and fear of You all over day and night as long as You keep me alive.
O Lord of the worlds!

verses.ar: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي كُلَّمَا قُلْتُ قَدْ تَهَيَّأْتُ وَتَعَبَّأْتُ
verses.en: O Allah, each time I decide to prepare and ready myself
for offering prayers before You and conversing confidentially with You,

verses.ar: أَلْقَيْتَ عَلَيَّ نُعَاساً إِذَا أَنَا صَلَّيْتُ
verses.en: You throw on me slumber whenever I stand for prayer;
thus, You deprive me of conversing with You confidentially whenever I try so.

verses.ar: مَالِي كُلَّمَا قُلْتُ قَدْ صَلُحَتْ سَرِيرَتِي
verses.en: What is the wrong with me? Whenever I feel that my inner self has become decent
and that my session has become similar to the sessions of those who turn much to You,

verses.ar: عَرَضَتْ لِي بَلِيَّةٌ أَزَالَتْ قَدَمِي وَحَالَتْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ خِدْمَتِكَ
verses.en: a misfortune would inflict me, causing my feet to be shaken, and standing against my showing servitude to You.
O my Master, perhaps You have pushed me away from Your door
and You have dismissed me from Your service!

verses.ar: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي مُسْتَخِفّاً بِحَقِّكَ فَأَقْصَيْتَنِي
verses.en: Or, perhaps, You have noticed that I belittled the duties that You have made incumbent upon me, and You thus set me aside!

verses.ar: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي مُعْرِضاً عَنْكَ فَقَلَيْتَنِي
verses.en: Or, perhaps, You have seen me turning away from You and thus You have turned away from me!

verses.ar: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ وَجَدْتَنِي فِي مَقَامِ ٱلْكَاذِبِينَ فَرَفَضْتَنِي
verses.en: Or, perhaps, You have found me in the manner of the liars and thus You have rejected me!

verses.ar: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي غَيْرَ شَاكِرٍ لِنَعْمَائِكَ فَحَرَمْتَنِي
verses.en: Or, perhaps, You have observed me showing no gratitude for Your graces and thus You have deprived me of them!

verses.ar: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ فَقَدْتَنِي مِنْ مَجَالِسِ ٱلْعُلَمَاءِ فَخَذَلْتَنِي
verses.en: Or, perhaps, You have not found me in the meetings of the scholars and thus You have let me down!

verses.ar: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي فِي ٱلْغَافِلِينَ فَمِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ آيَسْتَنِي
verses.en: Or, perhaps, You have seen me among the inattentive ones and thus You have made me despair of Your mercy!

verses.ar: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ رَأَيْتَنِي آلِفَ مَجَالِسِ ٱلْبَطَّالِينَ فَبَيْنِي وَبَيْنَهُمْ خَلَّيْتَنِي
verses.en: Or, perhaps, You have found me fond of the sessions of the wrongdoers and thus You have referred me to them!

verses.ar: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ لَمْ تُحِبَّ أَنْ تَسْمَعَ دُعَائِي فَبَاعَدْتَنِي
verses.en: Or, perhaps, You have not willed to hear my prayers and thus You have kept me away from You!
Or, perhaps, You have punished me for my offenses and sins!

verses.ar: أَوْ لَعَلَّكَ بِقِلَّةِ حَيَائِي مِنْكَ جَازَيْتَنِي
verses.en: Or, perhaps, You have penalized me for my shamelessness!

verses.ar: فَإِنْ عَفَوْتَ يَا رَبِّ فَطَالَمَا عَفَوْتَ عَنِ ٱلْمُذْنِبِينَ قَبْلِي
verses.en: If You forgive me, O Lord, then You have occasionally forgiven the sinners like me,

verses.ar: لأَنَّ كَرَمَكَ أَيْ رَبِّ يَجِلُّ عَنْ مُكَافَاةِ ٱلْمُقَصِّرِينَ
verses.en: because Your compassion, O my Lord, is too great to be compared to the punishment of the negligent.

verses.ar: وَأَنَا عَائِذٌ بِفَضْلِكَ هَارِبٌ مِنْكَ إِلَيْكَ
verses.en: I am now seeking refuge with Your generosity and fleeing for You to You,

verses.ar: مُتَنَجِّزٌ مَا وَعَدْتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّفْحِ عَمَّنْ أَحْسَنَ بِكَ ظَنّاً
verses.en: hoping for the promise that You have taken as regards pardoning those who have good idea about You.
O my God, You are too expansive in favor

verses.ar: وَأَعْظَمُ حِلْماً مِنْ أَنْ تُقَايِسَنِي بِعَمَلِي
verses.en: and too great in forbearance to punish me for my deed
or to chastise me for my sin.

verses.ar: وَمَا أَنَا يَا سَيِّدِي وَمَا خَطَرِي
verses.en: What am I? O Master! What is my weight?
Excuse me out of Your favor, O my Master,
act to me charitably our of Your pardon,
cover me with Your covering,
and let off chiding me out of the liberality of Your Face.
O my Master! I am the little that You have brought up,
I am the ignorant that You have taught,
I am the straying that You have guided,
I am the humble that You have given rise,
I am the afraid that You have given security,
I am the hungry that You have satiated,
I am the thirsty that You have watered,
I am the naked that You have dressed,
I am the poor that You have given affluence,
I am the weak that You have strengthened,
I am the lowly that You have given might,
I am the ill that You have cured,
I am the beggar that You have donated,
I am the sinner that You have covered,
I am the guilty that You have excused,
I am the valueless that You have evaluated,
I am the helpless that You have backed,
and I am the expelled that You have boarded.

verses.ar: أَنَا يَا رَبِّ ٱلَّذِي لَمْ أَسْتَحْيِكَ فِي ٱلْخَلاَءِ
verses.en: I am, O my Lord, the one who has not felt ashamed of You in secrets
and the one who has not considered Your watching over him in the public.
I am the committer of the grave transgressions,
I am the one who challenged his Master,
I am the one who disobeyed the All-great of the heavens,

verses.ar: أَنَا ٱلَّذِي أَعْطَيْتُ عَلَىٰ مَعَاصِي ٱلْجَلِيلِ ٱلرِّشَىٰ
verses.en: I am the one who has given bribes violating the laws of the All-lofty Lord,

verses.ar: أَنَا ٱلَّذِي حِينَ بُشِّرْتُ بِهَا خَرَجْتُ إِلَيْهَا أَسْعَىٰ
verses.en: I am the one who has been delighted for committing such sins,
I am the one who, although You have respited, has not cared,
I am the one whom, although You have covered him, has not felt ashamed,
who committed so many acts of disobedience that he has violated (all terms),
and who, although You have disregarded, has not minded.
So, out of Your forbearance have You given me respite.
You have concealed (my faults) with Your untouchable concealment as if You have been unaware of my acts.

verses.ar: وَمِنْ عُقُوبَاتِ ٱلْمَعَاصِي جَنَّبْتَنِي حَتَّىٰ كَأَنَّكَ ٱسْتَحْيَيْتَنِي
verses.en: You have not applied to me the punishments of committing acts of disobedience (to You) as if You are ashamed to face me.

verses.ar: إِلٰهِي لَمْ أَعْصِكَ حِينَ عَصَيْتُكَ وَأَنَا بِرُبُوبِيَّتِكَ جَاحِدٌ
verses.en: O my God, as I disobeyed You, I have never denied Your Lordship,
have never belittled Your ordains,
have never wished for exposing myself to Your chastisement,
and have never disparaged Your threat.

verses.ar: لَكِنْ خَطِيئَةٌ عَرَضَتْ وَسَوَّلَتْ لِي نَفْسِي
verses.en: Nevertheless, sins showed themselves desirable before me, my self commended to me,
my whim overwhelmed me,
my impudence helped me accordingly,
and I have been deceived by Your covering that You have laid on me.
So, I have exerted efforts in violating Your orders and disobeying You.
Now, who can ever save me from Your chastisement?

verses.ar: وَمِنْ أَيْدِي ٱلْخُصَمَاءِ غَداً مَنْ يُخَلِّصُنِي
verses.en: Tomorrow, who can save me from the hands of my rivals?

verses.ar: وَبِحَبْلِ مَنْ أَتَّصِلُ إِنْ أَنْتَ قَطَعْتَ حَبْلَكَ عَنِّي
verses.en: Whose rope will I catch if You cut off the rope between You and me?

verses.ar: فَوَاسَوْأَتَا عَلَىٰ مَا أَحْصَىٰ كِتَابُكَ مِنْ عَمَلِي
verses.en: Shame on me for my evildoings that Your Book has recorded.

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي لَوْلاَ مَا أَرْجُو مِنْ كَرَمِكَ وَسَعَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ
verses.en: Had it not been for Your generosity, the breadth of Your mercy,

verses.ar: وَنَهْيِكَ إِيَّايَ عَنِ ٱلَّذِي لْقُنُوطِ لَقَنَطْتُ عِنْدَمَا أَتَذَكَّرُهَا
verses.en: and Your warning me against being desperate—the matters that I hopefully depend on, I would have despaired whenever I remember my sins.
O Greatest Besought Who has been ever besought!
wa afdala man rajahu rajin
O Allah! I beseech You in the name of the liability of Islam,
I rely upon You in the name of the sanctity of the Qur’an,
in the name of my love for the Prophet; the Ummi (inhabitant of Mecca),
the Qurayshite, the Hashemite,
the Arab, the Tuhamite,
the Meccan, and the Madanite,
I hope for proximity to You.
So, do not disturb my familiarity with faith

verses.ar: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْ ثَوَابِي ثَوَابَ مَنْ عَبَدَ سِوَاكَ
verses.en: and do not make my reward the same as reward given to those who serve one other than You.

verses.ar: فَإِنَّ قَوْماً آمَنُوٱ بِأَلْسِنَتِهِمْ لِيَحْقِنُوٱ بِهِ دِمَاءَهُمْ
verses.en: Certainly, some people outwardly declared the faith so that they could prevent their blood from being shed.
However, they attained their goals.

verses.ar: وَإِنَّا آمَنَّا بِكَ بِأَلْسِنَتِنَا وَقُلُوبِنَا لِتَعْفُوَ عَنَّا
verses.en: We have believed in You by heart and tongue so that You may excuse us.
fa'adrikna ma ammalna
make firm our hope for You in our hearts,

verses.ar: وَلاَ تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا
verses.en: make not our hearts to deviate after You have guided us aright,
and grant us from You mercy.
Surely, You are the most liberal Giver.

verses.ar: فَوَعِزَّتِكَ لَوِ ٱنْتَهَرْتَنِي مَا بَرِحْتُ مِنْ بَابِكَ
verses.en: By Your Majesty I swear, O my Lord, even if You chide me, I shall never leave Your Door
and I shall never stop flattering You.

verses.ar: لِمَا أُلْهِمَ قَلْبِي مِنَ ٱلْمَعْرِفَةِ بِكَرَمِكَ وَسَعَةِ رَحْمَتِكَ
verses.en: This is because I have full acquaintance with Your (indescribable) generosity and bounty.

verses.ar: إِلَىٰ مَنْ يَذْهَبُ ٱلْعَبْدُ إِلاَّ إِلَىٰ مَوْلاهُ
verses.en: To whom may a servant go save to his Lord?

verses.ar: وَإِلَىٰ مَنْ يَلْتَجِئُ ٱلْمَخْلُوقُ إِلاَّ إِلَىٰ خَالِقِهِ
verses.en: To whom may a mortal resort save to his Creator?
O my God, even if You tie me with chains,
deprive me of the stream of Your bounties in the presence of people,
divulge all my scandalous acts before the eyes of all Your servants,
order me to Hell,
and prevent me from communicating the Pious ones,
(in spite of all that) I will never stop hoping for You,
I will never stop expecting Your pardon,
and Your love will never exit my heart.
I never forget Your graces that I enjoy
and Your having concealed my defects in the worldly abode.

verses.ar: سَيِّدِي أَخْرِجْ حُبَّ ٱلدُّنْيَا مِنْ قَلْبِي
verses.en: O my Master, (please) expel love for the world out of my heart,
join me with the Divinely-chosen Prophet and his Household,
the choicest of Your creatures and the seal of the Prophets:

verses.ar: مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ آلِهِ
verses.en: Muhammad, blessings of Allah be on him and on his Household.
Move me to the rank of repentance with You,

verses.ar: وَأَعِنِّي بِٱلْبُكَاءِ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي فَقَدْ أَفْنَيْتُ عُمْرِي
verses.en: help me weep for myself after I have come upon the last of my age,

verses.ar: وَقَدْ نَزَلْتُ مَنْزِلَةَ ٱلآيِسِينَ مِنْ خَيْرِي
verses.en: being in the manner of those who despair of any self-decency.
Who is then worse than I am

verses.ar: إِنْ أَنَا نُقِلْتُ عَلَىٰ مِثْلِ حَالِي
verses.en: when I, such being my case, will be taken to a grave
that I have neither paved for my long stay
nor furnished with righteous deed for my extended abode.
Why should I not weep

verses.ar: وَلاَ أَدْرِي إِلَىٰ مَا يَكُونُ مَصِيرِي
verses.en: while I do not know what my destiny will be?
And while I notice that my self is cheating me,
my days are deceiving me,

verses.ar: وَقَدْ خَفَقَتْ عِنْدَ رَأْسِي أَجْنِحَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ
verses.en: and the wings of death are fluttering over my head.
So, why should I not weep?
I weep for my soul’s departing my body.
I weep for the darkness of my grave.
I weep for the narrowness of my vault.
I weep for Munkar and Nakir (the two angels interrogating in graves) being interrogating me.

verses.ar: أَبْكِي لِخُرُوجِي مِنْ قَبْرِي عُرْيَاناً ذَلِيلاً
verses.en: I weep for my coming out of my grave (on the Resurrection Day) naked, humiliated,
carrying my burdens on my back,

verses.ar: أَنْظُرُ مَرَّةً عَنْ يَمِينِي وَأُخْرَىٰ عَنْ شِمَالِي
verses.en: distributing my sights to my right and my left.

verses.ar: إِذِ ٱلْخَلائِقُ فِي شَأْنٍ غَيْرِ شَأْنِي
verses.en: Behold! The creatures will each be engaged with matters other than mine.
Every man that day will have concern enough to make him heedless of others.
Many faces on that day shall be bright, laughing, joyous.

verses.ar: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَلَيْهَا غَبَرَةٌ تَرْهَقُهَا قَتَرَةٌ“ وَذِلَّةٌ
verses.en: And many faces on that day, on them shall be dust. Darkness, and humiliation shall cover them.
O my Master, on You I depend and rely.
In You I put my hope and faith.
To Your mercy I hang.
You direct Your mercy towards whomsoever You like
and You guide, out of Your honoring, whomsoever You will.

verses.ar: فَلَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ عَلَىٰ مَا نَقَّيْتَ مِنَ ٱلشِّرْكِ قَلْبِي
verses.en: So, all praise be to You for You have purified my heart from polytheism.
All praise be to You for You have made my tongue express utterly.
How can I praise You properly while my tongue is too short to do so?

verses.ar: أَمْ بِغَايَةِ جُهْدِي فِي عَمَلِي أُرْضِيكَ
verses.en: How can I please You while the extent of my efforts is too short to do so?

verses.ar: وَمَا قَدْرُ لِسَانِي يَا رَبِّ فِي جَنْبِ شُكْرِكَ
verses.en: What extent can my tongue reach if compared to the limitless extent of thanking You?

verses.ar: وَمَا قَدْرُ عَمَلِي فِي جَنْبِ نِعَمِكَ وَإِحْسَانِكَ
verses.en: What amount can my efforts reach if compared to the limitless amount of Your graces and favors?
O my God! It is certainly Your benevolence that has given me hope.
It is my thanks to You that have granted approval for my deeds.
O my Master, for You do I desire,
You do I fear,
and to You do I look forward.
It is my hope that has driven me towards You.
To You, O my One and Only God, do I direct my determination.
Towards what You have in possession are my desires directed.
For You is the ultimate of my hope and fear.
With You have I become familiar.
To You have I submitted my hand.
To the rope of obedience to You have I extended my fears.
O my Master, only through mentioning You have my heart lived.
Only through my confidential conversations with You have I cooled the pains of my fear.

verses.ar: فَيَا مَوْلايَ وَيَا مُؤَمَّلِي وَيَا مُنْتَهَىٰ سُؤْلِي
verses.en: So, O my Master! O my Trusty Patron! O Ultimate Hope!

verses.ar: فَرِّقْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ ذَنْبِيَ ٱلْمَانِعِ لِي مِنْ لُزُومِ طَاعَتِكَ
verses.en: Separate me from my transgressions which prevent me from adhering to the obedience to You.
I only pray You on account of my eternal faith in You
and my desire for Your mercy and kindness

verses.ar: ٱلَّذِي أَوْجَبْتَهُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِكَ مِنَ ٱلرَّأْفَةِ وَٱلرَّحْمَةِ
verses.en: that You have made incumbent upon Yourself.

verses.ar: فَٱلأَمْرُ لَكَ وَحْدَكَ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَكَ
verses.en: So, the whole affair is Yours alone. There is no partner with You at all.
All the creatures are dependent upon You and are in Your grip.
All things are submissive to You.
Blessed be You, O Lord of the worlds.
O my God, have mercy on me when my argument is proven nil,
when my tongue can no longer find any answer,
and when my mind scatters as soon as You start interrogating me.

verses.ar: فَيَا عَظِيمَ رَجَائِي لاَ تُخَيِّبْنِي إِذَا ٱشْتَدَّتْ فَاقَتِي
verses.en: So, O my great hope, do not forsake me when my need terribly increases,
do not reject me on account of my ignorance,
and do not stop conferring upon me on account of my lack of patience.
Grant me for I am poor.
Have mercy upon me for I am weak.
O my Master, on You do I rely and lean.
You are my hope, and in You do I have faith.
To Your mercy do I attach myself.
In Your courtyard do I dwell.
On account of Your benevolence do I declare my request.
With Your generosity, O my Lord, do I begin my prayers.
With You do I desire for meeting my needs.
Through Your wealth do I settle my poverty.
Under the shade of Your pardon do I stand.
Towards Your benevolence and generosity do I raise my sight.
I persistently look for Your favors;

verses.ar: فَلاَ تُحْرِقْنِي بِٱلنَّارِ وَأَنْتَ مَوْضِعُ أَمَلِي
verses.en: so, do not let the flames of the Fire consume me while You are my ultimate hope,

verses.ar: وَلاَ تُسْكِنِّي ٱلْهَاوِيَةَ فَإِنَّكَ قُرَّةُ عَيْنِي
verses.en: and do not embed me in the deep black abyss while You are the delight of my eyes.

verses.ar: يَا سَيِّدِي لاَ تُكَذِّبْ ظَنِّي بِإِحْسَانِكَ وَمَعْرُوفِكَ
verses.en: O my Master, do not thwart my idea about Your grace and favors,
for in You I trust.
Do not deprive me of Your rewards,
for You best know my poverty.

verses.ar: إِلٰهِي إِنْ كَانَ قَدْ دَنَا أَجَلِي وَلَمْ يُقَرِّبْنِي مِنْكَ عَمَلِي
verses.en: O my God, if my death is drawing near while my deeds have not yet drawn me near You,

verses.ar: فَقَدْ جَعَلْتُ ٱلإِعْتِرَافَ إِلَيْكَ بِذَنْبِي وَسَائِلَ عِلَلِي
verses.en: then let my confession of having committed sins be my means of justification.

verses.ar: إِلٰهِي إِنْ عَفَوْتَ فَمَنْ أَوْلَىٰ مِنْكَ بِٱلْعَفْوِ
verses.en: O my God, if You forgive, then who is worthier than You in forgiveness?

verses.ar: وَإِنْ عَذَّبْتَ فَمَنْ أَعْدَلُ مِنْكَ فِي ٱلْحُكْمِ
verses.en: And if You punish, then who is fairer than You in judgment?
Have mercy on my misery in this world,
on my grief at the time of death,
on my loneliness in the grave,
on my lonesomeness in the underground hole,

verses.ar: وَإِذَا نُشِرْتُ لِلْحِسَابِ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ ذُلَّ مَوْقِفِي
verses.en: and on my humiliating situation when I shall be resurrected for account before You.

verses.ar: وَٱغْفِرْ لِي مَا خَفِيَ عَلَىٰ ٱلآدَمِيِّينَ مِنْ عَمَلِي
verses.en: Forgive my deeds that have been concealed from the other human beings,
make permanent for me that on account of which You have covered my faults,

verses.ar: وَٱرْحَمْنِي صَرِيعاً عَلَىٰ ٱلْفِرَاشِ تُقَلِّبُنِي أَيْدِي أَحِبَّتِي
verses.en: have mercy on me when I am thrown on the death bed turned over at the hands of my dear ones,

verses.ar: وَتَفَضَّلْ عَلَيَّ مَمْدُوداً عَلَىٰ ٱلْمُغْتَسَلِ يُقَلِّبُنِي صَالِحُ جِيرَتِي
verses.en: do a favor to me when I am laid on the table of the dead bathroom turned over at the hands of my righteous neighbors,

verses.ar: وَتَحَنَّنْ عَلَيَّ مَحْمُولاً قَدْ تَنَاوَلَ ٱلأَقْرِبَاءُ أَطْرَافَ جِنَازَتِي
verses.en: act kindly towards me when I am carried while my relatives hold the edges of my coffin,

verses.ar: وَجُدْ عَلَيَّ مَنْقُولاً قَدْ نَزَلْتُ بِكَ وَحِيداً فِي حُفْرَتِي
verses.en: be generous with me when I am carried, alone, to my hole,

verses.ar: وَٱرْحَمْ فِي ذٰلِكَ ٱلْبَيْتِ ٱلْجَدِيدِ غُرْبَتِي حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَسْتَأْنِسَ بِغَيْرِكَ
verses.en: have mercy on my loneliness in that (new) dwelling so that I will not feel at ease with anyone other than You.

verses.ar: يَا سَيِّدِي إِنْ وَكَلْتَنِي إِلَىٰ نَفْسِي هَلَكْتُ
verses.en: O my Master, if You leave me for myself, I will certainly perish.

verses.ar: سَيِّدِي فَبِمَنْ أَسْتَغِيثُ إِنْ لَمْ تُقِلْنِي عَثْرَتِي
verses.en: O my Master, to whom will I resort if You do not overlook my slips?

verses.ar: فَإِلَىٰ مَنْ أَفْزَعُ إِنْ فَقَدْتُ عِنَايَتَكَ فِي ضَجْعَتِي
verses.en: To whom will I run for help if I miss Your care for me in my stay (in grave)?

verses.ar: وَإِلَىٰ مَنْ أَلْتَجِئُ إِنْ لَمْ تُنَفِّسْ كُرْبَتِي
verses.en: To whom will I refer if You do not relieve my grief?
O my Master! Who will be with me?
Who will have mercy on me if You do not?

verses.ar: وَفَضْلَ مَنْ أُؤَمِّلُ إِنْ عَدِمْتُ فَضْلَكَ يَوْمَ فَاقَتِي
verses.en: Whose favor will I expect if I miss Your favors on the day of my neediness?

verses.ar: وَإِلَىٰ مَنِ ٱلْفِرَارُ مِنَ ٱلذُّنُوبِ إِذَا ٱنْقَضَىٰ أَجَلِي
verses.en: To whom will I flee from my sins when my deadline comes?
O my Master, do not punish me while I please You hopefully.
O my God, (please do) give success to my expectations
and dispel my fear.

verses.ar: فَإِنَّ كَثْرَةَ ذُنُوبِي لاَ أَرْجُو فِيهَا إِلاَّ عَفْوَكَ
verses.en: As for my numerous sins, I hope for nothing other than Your pardon.

verses.ar: سَيِّدِي أَنَا أَسْأَلُكَ مَا لاَ أَسْتَحِقُّ
verses.en: O my Master, I am asking You for things that I do not deserve
and You are verily the worthiest of being feared and the worthiest of forgiving.

verses.ar: فَٱغْفِرْ لِي وَأَلْبِسْنِي مِنْ نَظَرِكَ ثَوْباً يُغَطِّي عَلَيَّ ٱلتَّبِعَاتِ
verses.en: So, forgive me and dress me, out of Your relief, a garment covering all my defects,
and forgive them for me so that I will not be responsible for them.
Verily, You are the Lord of eternal favoring,
wa safhin `azimin
and liberal exoneration.

verses.ar: إِلٰهِي أَنْتَ ٱلَّذِي تُفِيضُ سَيْبَكَ عَلَىٰ مَنْ لاَ يَسْأَلُكَ
verses.en: O my God, You make Your flowing graces reach those who never pray You
and those who deny Your Lordship.

verses.ar: فَكَيْفَ سَيِّدِي بِمَنْ سَأَلَكَ وَأَيْقَنَ أَنَّ ٱلْخَلْقَ لَكَ وَٱلأَمْرَ إِلَيْكَ
verses.en: So, O my Master, what should You do to those who pray You and believe undoubtedly that You manage all creation and all affairs!
Blessed by You and Exalted be You, O Lord of the worlds!

verses.ar: سَيِّدِي عَبْدُكَ بِبَابِكَ أَقَامَتْهُ ٱلْخَصَاصَةُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ
verses.en: O my Master, I, Your servant, am standing at Your door owing to neediness,
yaqra`u baba ihsanika bidu`a'ihi
So, do not turn Your generous Face away from me.

verses.ar: وَٱقْبَلْ مِنِّي مَا أَقُولُ فَقَدْ دَعَوْتُ بِهٰذَا ٱلدُّعَاءِ
verses.en: Accept that which I utter, for I have prayed using this supplication,

verses.ar: وَأَنَا أَرْجُو أَنْ لاَ تَرُدَّنِي مَعْرِفَةً مِنِّي بِرَأْفَتِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ
verses.en: hoping that You will not reject me since I have full awareness of Your kindness and mercifulness.

verses.ar: إِلٰهِي أَنْتَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُحْفِيكَ سَائِلٌ
verses.en: O my God, it is You Whom is never disturbed by any suppliant
and Whose kingdom is never decreased owing to donations.

verses.ar: أَنْتَ كَمَا تَقُولُ وَفَوْقَ مَا نَقُولُ
verses.en: You are as exactly as You describe Yourself and is above all that which we say.
O Allah, I beseech You for comely patience,
wa farajan qariban
wa qawlan sadiqan
and splendid reward.

verses.ar: أَسْأَلُكَ يَا رَبِّ مِنَ ٱلْخَيْرِ كُلِّهِ
verses.en: I pray You, O Lord, for all goodness,

verses.ar: مَا عَلِمْتُ مِنْهُ وَمَا لَمْ أَعْلَمْ
verses.en: be it known by me or unknown.

verses.ar: أَسْأَلُكَ ٱللَّهُمَّ مِنْ خَيْرِ مَا سَأَلَكَ مِنْهُ عِبَادُكَ ٱلصَّالِحُونَ
verses.en: I pray You, O Allah, for the goodness that Your righteous servants have besought from You.
O All-excellent One that is asked!
O most benevolent of those who may give!
(Please do) respond to my request as regards myself, my family,
my parents, my children,
my comrades, and my brothers-in-faith.
Bless my living,
manifest my integrity,
set aright all my affairs,
and include me with those whom You decide to live long,
whose deeds are righteous,
those for whom You have perfected Your favors, those with whom You are pleased,

verses.ar: وَأَحْيَيْتَهُ حَيَاةً طَيِّبَةً فِي أَدْوَمِ ٱلسُّرُورِ
verses.en: and those whom You have granted comfortable life with permanent pleasure,
reputable honor, and perfect contentment.
Verily, You do whatever You will,
wa la yaf`alu ma yasha'u ghayruka
O Allah, give me exclusively the grace of private mention of You,

verses.ar: وَلاَ تَجْعَلْ شَيْئاً مِمَّا أَتَقَرَّبُ بِهِ
verses.en: do not let any of the things by which I seek Your nearness
in the hours of the night and the ends of the days
take the form of ostentation, showing off,
wa la asharan wa la bataran
Include me with the humble ones.
O Allah, grant me affluent means of livelihood,
security in my homeland,

verses.ar: وَقُرَّةَ ٱلْعَيْنِ فِي ٱلأَهْلِ وَٱلْمَالِ وَٱلْوَلَدِ
verses.en: delight in my family, property, and children,
permanence of Your graces,
walssihhata fi aljismi
walquwwata fi albadani
and sound faith.
Dedicate my affairs to the obedience to You and to Your Messenger,

verses.ar: مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰ آلِهِ أَبَداً مَا ٱسْتَعْمَرْتَنِي
verses.en: Muhammad—Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household—as long as You give me life.

verses.ar: وَٱجْعَلْنِي مِنْ أَوْفَرِ عِبَادِكَ عِنْدَكَ نَصِيباً
verses.en: Make me one of the most rewarded servants of You

verses.ar: فِي كُلِّ خَيْرٍ أَنْزَلْتَهُ وَتُنْزِلُهُ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
verses.en: in each and every item of goodness that You have descended and You will descend during the month of Ramadan
and at the Destiny Night

verses.ar: وَمَا أَنْتَ مُنْزِلُهُ فِي كُلِّ سَنَةٍ مِنْ رَحْمَةٍ تَنْشُرُهَا
verses.en: as well as all that which You decide to descend throughout the year, including mercy that You spread,
good health with which You adorn,
misfortune that You repel,
good deeds that You admit,
and evildoings that You excuse.

verses.ar: وَٱرْزُقْنِي حَجَّ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْحَرَامِ فِي عَامِنَا هٰذَا وَفِي كُلِّ عَامٍ
verses.en: Bestow upon me with pilgrimage to Your Holy House in this year plus all years,

verses.ar: وَٱرْزُقْنِي رِزْقاً وَاسِعاً مِنْ فَضْلِكَ ٱلْوَاسِعِ
verses.en: grant me prosperous sustenance out of Your limitless bounty,
dismiss, O my Master, all evils from me,

verses.ar: وَٱقْضِ عَنِّي ٱلدَّيْنَ وَٱلظًُّلاَمَاتِ حَتَّىٰ لاَ أَتَأَذَّىٰ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْهُ
verses.en: help me settle my debts as well as my evildoings so that I will be saved from their liabilities,

verses.ar: وَخُذْ عَنِّي بِأَسْمَاعِ وَأَبْصَارِ أَعْدَائِي وَحُسَّادِي وَٱلْبَاغِينَ عَلَيَّ
verses.en: save me from the hearings and sights of my enemies, those who envy me, and those who intend to oppress me,
back me against them,
give delight to my eye and joy to my heart,

verses.ar: وَٱجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ هَمِّي وَكَرْبِي فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً
verses.en: grant me relief and exit against my grief and misery,

verses.ar: وَٱجْعَلْ مَنْ أَرَادَنِي بِسُوءٍ مِنْ جَمِيعِ خَلْقِكَ تَحْتَ قَدَمَيَّ
verses.en: make all those who intend evil to me, among all Your creatures, be under my feet,
protect me against the evil of Satan,
the evil of the ruling authority,
and the consequences of my evildoings,
purify me from all my sins,
save me from Hellfire on account of Your pardon,
allow me to enter Paradise on account of Your mercy,
marry me off the Paradisiacal women on account of Your grace,
and join me to Your righteous intimate servants—Muhammad and his Household,
the purified, the immaculate, and the pious.

verses.ar: صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِمْ وَعَلَىٰ أَجْسَادِهِمْ وَأَرْوَاحِهِمْ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
verses.en: May Your peace, mercy, and blessings be upon their bodies and souls.
O my God and my Master, I swear by Your Mighty and Your Glory,
if You will interrogate me for my sins, I will demand with Your pardon.
If You interrogate me for my meanness, I will demand with Your kindness.

verses.ar: وَلَئِنْ أَدْخَلْتَنِي ٱلنَّارَ َلأُخْبِرَنَّ أَهْلَ ٱلنَّارِ بِحُبِّي لَكَ
verses.en: If You order me to Hellfire, I will tell all the inhabitants therein that I love You.

verses.ar: إِلٰهِي وَسَيِّدِي إِنْ كُنْتَ لاَ تَغْفِرُ إِلاَّ لأَوْلِيَائِكَ وَأَهْلِ طَاعَتِكَ
verses.en: O my God and Master, if you forgive only Your intimate servants and those who obey You,
to whom then will the sinful resort?

verses.ar: وَإِنْ كُنْتَ لاَ تُكْرِمُ إِلاَّ أَهْلَ ٱلْوَفَاءِ بِكَ
verses.en: If You honor none but those who act loyally to You,
then whose shelter will the evildoers seek?

verses.ar: إِلٰهِي إِنْ أَدْخَلْتَنِي ٱلنَّارَ فَفِي ذٰلِكَ سُرُورُ عَدُوِّكَ
verses.en: O my God, if You decide to put me in Hellfire, this will definitely please Your enemies!

verses.ar: وَإِنْ أَدْخَلْتَنِي ٱلْجَنَّةَ فَفِي ذٰلِكَ سُرُورُ نَبِيِّكَ
verses.en: But if You decide Paradise for me, then this will certainly please Your Prophet!

verses.ar: وَأَنَا وَٱللَّهِ أَعْلَمُ أَنَّ سُرُورَ نَبِيِّكَ أَحَبُّ إِلَيْكَ مِنْ سُرُورِ عَدُوِّكَ
verses.en: And I—by Allah I swear it—know for sure that the pleasure of Your Prophet is more favorable for You than the pleasure of Your enemies.

verses.ar: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَمْلأَ قَلْبِي حُبّاً لَكَ
verses.en: O Allah, I pray You for filling my heart with love for You,
with fear of You,
with belief in Your Book,
with faith in You,
with dread from You,
and with eagerness to You.

verses.ar: يَا ذَا ٱلْجَلالِ وَٱلإِكْرَامِ حَبِّبْ إِلَيَّ لِقَاءَكَ
verses.en: O Lord of Glory and Honor, (please do) make me love meeting You,
(please do) love my meeting,

verses.ar: وَٱجْعَلْ لِي فِي لِقَائِكَ ٱلرَّاحَةَ وَٱلْفَرَجَ وَٱلْكَرَامَةَ
verses.en: and make my meeting You entail comfort, relief, and honoring.
O Allah, join me with the righteous ones among the past generations,

verses.ar: وَٱجْعَلْنِي مِنْ صَالِحِ مَنْ بَقِيَ وَخُذْ بِي سَبِيلَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
verses.en: include me with the righteous ones of this generation, guide me to the path of the righteous ones,

verses.ar: وَأَعِنِّي عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي بِمَا تُعِينُ بِهِ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ عَلَىٰ أَنْفُسِهِمْ
verses.en: help me against myself in just as You help the righteous ones control themselves,
seal my deed with the best of it,
decide Paradise as the reward of my deeds on account of Your mercy,
help me manage the good things that You have endowed upon me,

verses.ar: وَثَبِّتْنِي يَا رَبِّ وَلاَ تَرُدَّنِي فِي سُوءٍ ٱسْتَنْقَذْتَنِي مِنْهُ
verses.en: make me firm, O Lord, and do not make me return to evildoing after You have saved me from it.
O Lord of the worlds!

verses.ar: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ إِيـمَاناً لاَ أَجَلَ لَهُ دُونَ لِقَائِكَ
verses.en: O Allah, I beseech You for faith that does not stop until I meet You.
As long as You grant me lifetime, (please do) connect me to that faith,
and when You decide to grasp my soul, make me carry that faith with me.
When You resurrect me, make me carry it with me.

verses.ar: وَأَبْرِئْ قَلْبِي مِنَ ٱلرِّيَاءِ وَٱلشَّكِّ وَٱلسُّمْعَةِ فِي دِينِكَ
verses.en: Release my heart from showing off, suspicion, and pretension in the affairs of Your religion
so that my deed will be purely intended for Your sake.
O Allah, grant me discerning awareness in Your religion,
understanding of Your laws,
insight in Your knowledge,
two folds of Your mercy,
and piety that impedes me from disobeying You.
Make my face glitter on account of Your light,
make me desire for nothing but that which You hold,

verses.ar: وَتَوَفَّنِي فِي سَبِيلِكَ وَعَلَىٰ مِلَّةِ رَسُولِكَ
verses.en: and when I die, make me die following Your Path and carrying the principles of Your Prophet—
Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Household.

verses.ar: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ ٱلْكَسَلِ وَٱلْفَشَلِ
verses.en: O Allah, I seek Your protection against laziness, failure,
walhammi waljubni walbukhli
walghaflati walqaswati walmaskanati
walfaqri walfaqati

verses.ar: وَكُلِّ بَلِيَّةٍ وَٱلْفَوَاحِشِ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهَا وَمَا بَطَنَ
verses.en: and against all misfortunes and all shameful deeds, whether open or secret.

verses.ar: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ نَفْسٍ لاَ تَقْنَعُ
verses.en: I seek Your protection against having unsatisfied self,
wa batnin la yashba`u
wa qalbin la yakhsha`u
wa du`a'in la yusma`u
and futile deed.

verses.ar: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ يَا رَبِّ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي وَدِينِي وَمَالِي
verses.en: I ask You, O Lord, to guard myself, my religion, my properties,

verses.ar: وَعَلَىٰ جَمِيعِ مَا رَزَقْتَنِي مِنَ ٱلشَّيْطَانِ ٱلرَّجِيمِ
verses.en: and all that which You have granted me against Satan the accursed.
Verily, You are the All-hearing, the All-knowing.

verses.ar: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّهُ لاَ يُجِيرُنِي مِنْكَ أَحَدٌ
verses.en: O Allah, none can ever save me against You
and I can never find any shelter against You.

verses.ar: فَلاَ تَجْعَلْ نَفْسِي فِي شَيْءٍ مِنْ عَذَابِكَ
verses.en: So, (please) do not make anything that brings about Your punishment control over me,
do not let me lead myself to perdition,
and do not make me deserve the painful chastisement.
O Allah, accept from me,
grant me reputation,
elevate my rank,
exonerate my offenses,
do not refer to me with my faults,
let the reward of my sessions,
my utterance,
and my prayer be Your pleasure and Paradise.

verses.ar: وَأَعْطِنِي يَا رَبِّ جَمِيعَ مَا سَأَلْتُكَ وَزِدْنِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
verses.en: Give me, O Lord, all that which I have asked for from You and grant me more favor,

verses.ar: إِنِّي إِلَيْكَ رَاغِبٌ يَا رَبَّ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
verses.en: for I seek none but You, O Lord of the worlds!

verses.ar: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ أَنْزَلْتَ فِي كِتَابِكَ أَنْ نَعْفُوَ عَمَّنْ ظَلَمَنَا
verses.en: O Allah, You have ordered us in Your book that we should overlook those who wrong us.

verses.ar: وَقَدْ ظَلَمْنَا أَنْفُسَنَا فَٱعْفُ عَنَّا فَإِنَّكَ أَوْلَىٰ بِذٰلِكَ مِنَّا
verses.en: We have thus wronged ourselves; so, forgive us, for You are worthier of forgiveness than we are.

verses.ar: وَأَمَرْتَنَا أَنْ لاَ نَرُدَّ سَائِلاً عَنْ أَبْوَابِنَا
verses.en: You have ordered us not to reject any beggar being on our doors.

verses.ar: وَقَدْ جِئْتُكَ سَائِلاً فَلاَ تَرُدَّنِي إِلاَّ بِقَضَاءِ حَاجَتِي
verses.en: Here I am begging You; so, do not reject me; rather, respond to my need.

verses.ar: وَأَمَرْتَنَا بِٱلإِحْسَانِ إِلَىٰ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُنَا
verses.en: You have ordered us to act nicely to those under our authorities.

verses.ar: وَنَحْنُ أَرِقَّاؤُكَ فَأَعْتِقْ رِقَابَنَا مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ
verses.en: We are surely under Your authority; so, release us from Hellfire.
O my Shelter whenever I am aggrieved!
O my Aid whenever hardships hit me!
To You have I resorted.
With You have I sought refuge and haven.
To none save You shall I ever resort.
From none save You shall I ever seek for relief.
So, (please do) aid me and relieve my hardship.

verses.ar: يَا مَنْ يَقْبَلُ ٱلْيَسِيرَ وَيَعْفُو عَنِ ٱلْكَثِيرِ
verses.en: O He Who accepts the little (deed) and overlooks the much (wrong)!

verses.ar: ٱقْبَلْ مِنِّيَ ٱلْيَسِيرَ وَٱعْفُ عَنِّيَ ٱلْكَثِيرَ
verses.en: Accept my little (deed) and overlook my much (wrong).
You are certainly the All-merciful, the All-forgiving.

verses.ar: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ إِيـمَاناً تُبَاشِرُ بِهِ قَلْبِي
verses.en: O Allah, I pray You for faith that covers my heart

verses.ar: وَيَقِيناً صَادِقاً حَتَّىٰ أَعْلَمَ أَنَّهُ لَنْ يُصِيبَنِي إِلاَّ مَا كَتَبْتَ لِي
verses.en: and for honest conviction so that I will believe that nothing will inflict me save that about which You have already known.

verses.ar: وَرَضِّنِي مِنَ ٱلْعَيْشِ بِمَا قَسَمْتَ لِي
verses.en: Make me be satisfied with my livelihood that You have decided for me.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
